hero.title: Hi, I'm <1>Ekki</1>
hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer (QA)
hero.description: I'm a Senior QA Engineer at Ninja Van with over 4 years of experience building automation frameworks for web, mobile, and APIs. I believe in "Tooling over Manual Labor"—building custom systems that empower teams to ship with confidence while preventing critical production issues.

philosophy.title: Engineering Quality
philosophy.intro: Quality isn't just about checking boxes. It's about Shift-Left and taking ownership of production.
philosophy.listIntro: I built TestingWithEkki to demonstrate the same engineering rigor I apply at work:

list.auth: Scalable Architecture: Real authentication and session management, not just a static site.
list.code: Interactive Tooling: Sandboxed environments similar to the custom dev tools I build for internal teams.
list.gamification: User Engagement: Gamification mechanics to make learning automation sticky.

philosophy.conclusion: Quality is an engineering discipline. I build the tools and frameworks that enforce reliability. Whether it's a Go backend or this React platform, I write code that solves real quality problems.

expertise.title: Technical Expertise
expertise.subtitle: My toolkit for building stable, scalable systems
